# Learn App Summary — Turmeric Market Survey (SYNTHETIC)

**App ID:** LRN-TURMERIC-SYN-0001
**Archetype:** atomic-visit
**Source PDD:** `pdd.md`

## Purpose
Train FLWs on the turmeric vendor-observation workflow: taking MTN-card
photos, delivering the education message, completing the intake form.

## Modules

1. **Photo Workflow Training** — two forms covering how to frame a vendor
   photo with the MTN card visible, and lighting/exposure basics.
2. **Vendor Education** — script and roleplay for delivering the
   education message and handling skeptical vendors.
3. **Vendor Intake Form Walkthrough** — field-by-field walkthrough of
   the Deliver form, with examples for each select-one option.

## Time to Complete
~35 minutes end-to-end. Designed to be completed once during FLW
onboarding, before the first real delivery.

## Out of Scope
- No assessment of lab testing procedures (FLWs don't test, only observe)
- No branching scenarios (single archetype, single visit type)
